settings.title: ThinkPad - Fan & Thermal Control - Settings
settings.dynamic-coloring-desc: Changes the color of the bar capsule when the fan is stopped or at a custom level
settings.allow-popup-desc: Left-click on the widget to open the manual fan override panel
settings.color-level0-desc: Capsule color when the fan is off (Level 0)
settings.color-active-desc: Capsule color when the fan runs at a forced speed (every mode except automatic and off)
settings.color-auto-desc: Optional capsule color for automatic mode (leave on the neutral option to match the bar)
